title: KPI Template Marketplace
subtitle_one: {{count}} industry template ready to import. Select the ones that apply to your organization — created in one click.
subtitle_other: {{count}} industry templates ready to import. Select the ones that apply to your organization — created in one click.

sales.label: Sales
sales.description: KPIs for commercial and revenue teams

ingresos_mensuales.name: Monthly revenue
ingresos_mensuales.description: Total revenue generated during the month by the sales team.
ingresos_mensuales.criteria: Sum of all contracts closed during the period, expressed in local currency.

nuevos_clientes_adquiridos.name: New customers acquired
nuevos_clientes_adquiridos.description: Number of new customers who signed a contract for the first time.
nuevos_clientes_adquiridos.criteria: Customers without a previous contract who signed during the period.

tasa_de_conversion.name: Conversion rate
tasa_de_conversion.description: Percentage of opportunities converted into closed sales.

ticket_promedio.name: Average deal size
ticket_promedio.description: Average value of each closed sale during the period.
ticket_promedio.criteria: Total revenue divided by the number of closed sales.

retencion_de_clientes.name: Customer retention
retencion_de_clientes.description: Percentage of customers who renew or remain active.
retencion_de_clientes.criteria: (Customers who renewed / Customers at the start of the period) × 100.

churn_rate.name: Churn rate
churn_rate.description: Percentage of customers who canceled during the period.
churn_rate.criteria: (Lost customers / Customers at the start of the period) × 100.

tech.label: Technology
tech.description: KPIs for engineering, product, and DevOps teams

tickets_cerrados.name: Closed tickets
tickets_cerrados.description: Number of tickets resolved during the period.
tickets_cerrados.criteria: Tickets with status "closed" or "resolved" in the tracking system (Jira, Linear, etc.).

bugs_criticos_resueltos.name: Critical bugs resolved
bugs_criticos_resueltos.description: High or critical priority bugs closed during the period.
bugs_criticos_resueltos.criteria: Tickets tagged as "bug" with "high" or "critical" priority closed during the period.

uptime_del_servicio.name: Service uptime
uptime_del_servicio.criteria: (Available minutes / Total minutes in the period) × 100. Scheduled maintenance excluded.

tiempo_de_respuesta_promedio_api.name: Average response time (API)
tiempo_de_respuesta_promedio_api.description: Average API endpoint latency in milliseconds.
tiempo_de_respuesta_promedio_api.criteria: 95th percentile latency measured by the monitoring system (Datadog, New Relic, etc.).

cobertura_de_tests.name: Test coverage
cobertura_de_tests.description: Percentage of code covered by automated tests.
cobertura_de_tests.criteria: Covered lines / Total lines in the codebase, according to the coverage report.

deploys_a_produccion.name: Production deploys
deploys_a_produccion.description: Number of successful deploys performed during the period.
deploys_a_produccion.criteria: Deployments that reached production without rollback during the first 24h.

mean_time_to_recovery_mttr.name: Mean Time to Recovery (MTTR)
mean_time_to_recovery_mttr.description: Average recovery time after production incidents.
mean_time_to_recovery_mttr.criteria: Average minutes between incident detection and service restoration.

hr.label: Human Resources
hr.description: KPIs for People, Talent, and HR teams

tasa_de_retencion_de_talento.name: Talent retention rate
tasa_de_retencion_de_talento.description: Percentage of employees who remain in the organization.
tasa_de_retencion_de_talento.criteria: ((Employees at the end - New hires) / Employees at the start) × 100.

tiempo_de_cobertura_de_vacantes.name: Time to fill vacancies
tiempo_de_cobertura_de_vacantes.description: Average days from job opening to candidate onboarding.
tiempo_de_cobertura_de_vacantes.criteria: Average days between job posting and candidate start date.

nps_de_empleados_enps.name: Employee NPS (eNPS)
nps_de_empleados_enps.description: Internal Net Promoter Score measured through climate surveys.

ausentismo.name: Absenteeism
ausentismo.description: Percentage of workdays lost due to unplanned absences.

capacitaciones_completadas.name: Completed trainings
capacitaciones_completadas.description: Number of trainings or courses completed by the team.
capacitaciones_completadas.criteria: Modules or courses marked as completed in the learning platform.

ops.label: Operations
ops.description: KPIs for operations, logistics, and quality teams

on_time_delivery_otd.name: On-Time Delivery (OTD)
on_time_delivery_otd.description: Percentage of deliveries completed on time and in full.

costo_operativo_por_unidad.name: Operating cost per unit
costo_operativo_por_unidad.description: Average operating cost per processed unit.
costo_operativo_por_unidad.criteria: Total operating costs during the period divided by processed units.

tasa_de_defectos.name: Defect rate
tasa_de_defectos.description: Percentage of produced units with defects.

productividad_por_colaborador.name: Productivity per employee
productividad_por_colaborador.description: Processed units or value generated per person during the period.
productividad_por_colaborador.criteria: Total team output divided by active employees.

sla_de_atencion_al_cliente.name: Customer support SLA
sla_de_atencion_al_cliente.description: Percentage of customer tickets resolved within the agreed SLA.

marketing.label: Marketing
marketing.description: KPIs for marketing, growth, and communications teams

leads_generados.name: Generated leads
leads_generados.description: Number of new leads captured during the period.
leads_generados.criteria: New contacts with validated data that entered the CRM during the period.

costo_por_lead_cpl.name: Cost per lead (CPL)
costo_por_lead_cpl.description: Average marketing spend for each generated lead.
costo_por_lead_cpl.criteria: Total marketing spend / Number of generated leads.

trafico_organico.name: Organic traffic
trafico_organico.description: Website visits coming from organic search.
trafico_organico.criteria: "Organic Search" channel sessions in Google Analytics or equivalent.

tasa_de_apertura_de_emails.name: Email open rate
tasa_de_apertura_de_emails.description: Percentage of recipients who opened campaign emails.

roi_de_campanas.name: Campaign ROI
roi_de_campanas.description: Return on investment from marketing campaigns.

finance.label: Finance
finance.description: KPIs for finance, treasury, and controlling teams

ebitda.name: EBITDA
ebitda.description: Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization.
ebitda.criteria: Operating income + depreciation + amortization, according to the income statement.

dias_de_cobro_dso.name: Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)
dias_de_cobro_dso.description: Average number of days it takes to collect an invoice.
dias_de_cobro_dso.criteria: (Accounts receivable / Period revenue) × days in the period.

liquidez_corriente.name: Current ratio
liquidez_corriente.description: Ratio between current assets and current liabilities.
liquidez_corriente.criteria: Current assets / Current liabilities. Optimal value > 1.

presupuesto_ejecutado.name: Executed budget
presupuesto_ejecutado.description: Percentage of the approved budget that was actually executed.
presupuesto_ejecutado.criteria: (Actual spend / Approved budget) × 100. Target: 100% (neither under nor over execution).
